subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: People must live for one another and not live in seclusion as the monks and nuns. People should not live solitary lives. Light is of no value in an empty room... Man must work and in that work show the qualities of God and thus do good
subcodes.subjects: @need for cooperation; solitary existence not possible, @importance of community building, @work as worship, @service to others; to the Cause of God
